title: The Alliance Collides with Kaido’s Forces
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Big Mom, Kinemon, Orochi, Momonosuke, Unknown person #14 as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Whether the Kozuki or the Kurozumi Rule...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Why!!? They were Allies for so long!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Alliance
dialogue.text: Choose, Samurai! Become Pirates with us!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Or fight us here and die!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To prepare ourselves for the "Final War" that's coming, we're going to turn this country into "The Pirate Empire"!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The raids, which are our main activity, are surely going to increase as well!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This country is now named "New Oniga- Shima"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And its Shogun will be my son, Yamato!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: As if that is going to happen!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Show me the way quickly, or momo is going to get killed!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 33 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
